packet.objective: A request from tenant B can receive tenant A's fallback policy after the active tenant changes, especially when both requests use the same route. Diagnose the exact root cause, identify the call path that makes the leak possible, and identify the two source files that must change to fix the isolation bug.

source_snippets.content:
1 | package main
   2 | 
   3 | import (
   4 |     "example.local/tenantleak/internal/app"
   5 |     "example.local/tenantleak/internal/policy"
   6 |     "example.local/tenantleak/internal/routing"
   7 |     "example.local/tenantleak/internal/tenant"
   8 | )
   9 | 
  10 | func main() {
  11 |     active := &tenant.Active{}
  12 |     router := routing.NewEngine(active, policy.NewCache(), &policy.Store{})
  13 |     _ = app.NewServer(router)
  14 | }
  15 |
